hub_provider.title: Domain & Public Services
hub_provider.text: Public sources are partially unavailable. Investigate machines behind the domain edge and check whether routing tampering is causing the outage.

provider_dns.title: Public DNS Resolver (appliance)
provider_dns.text: Role: public authoritative and recursive DNS. Citizens report unavailable public sources. You can inspect zone files and poisoned cache indicators.

options.label: Inspect zone files and DNS logs
options.effectText: Found malicious DNS redirection IoCs tied to outage complaints.

options.label: Block all external DNS traffic (unsafe)
options.effectText: Emergency block collapsed public segment availability.

provider_router.title: Routing Firewall Service
provider_router.text: Role: inter-segment routing + firewall policy orchestrator. If this routing service is blocked, this segment collapses.

options.label: Audit routing service and restore clean rules
options.effectText: Recovered tampered route table and preserved segment connectivity.

options.label: Disable routing daemon in firewall
options.effectText: Routing disabled: provider segment collapsed exactly as warned.

provider_proxy.title: Internal Proxy Cache
provider_proxy.text: Role: API cache and public mirror proxy. Check stored files, including legitimate bundles, for malware staging.

options.label: Check cache files and signed package mirrors
options.effectText: Legitimate-looking package was trojanized; IOC added to sidebar.
